title: Plutarch, Moralia: Consolation to His Wife
description: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: Consolation to His Wife.
introduction: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: Consolation to His Wife.

translation.text: From Plutarch's 'Consolation to His Wife': In this essay, Plutarch examines this important aspect of the moral life with his characteristic combination of erudition, anecdote, and practical wisdom.
